purpose: Detailed walk-through of the planning phase: deep-thinking analysis, task decomposition, dependency mapping, layout choice (waves vs chains vs hybrid), shared-file conflict resolution, and final emission of plan.json. Documents the artifacts the planning phase produces and the quality gates the master applies before transitioning to dispatch.
gotchas: Skipping plan.json and going straight to initialization.json loses the rationale needed for replanning
Tasks needing more than 2-3 sentences of description are usually too big and should be split
patterns: Spend more time planning than executing -- planning prevents most swarm failures
conventions: plan.json captures the why; initialization.json captures the what
